response: An exoplanet is a planet that orbits a star outside our solar system. They can be made of rock, gas, or ice, and vary greatly in size and temperature. Thousands have been discovered since the 1990s.

AutoGPT is an experimental open-source application that demonstrates the capabilities of the GPT-4 language model by making it autonomous.
